name: wirespec-ide-companion
description: Small VS Code companion for WireSpec review task files and annotation threads.

commands.title: WireSpec: Open next open task target
WireSpec: Resolve touched threads for active file

wirespec.ide.autoOpenTaskFiles.description: Automatically open changed WireSpec task files in preview mode.

wirespec.ide.autoRevealFirstTarget.description: After a task file changes, also reveal the most severe open target.

wirespec.ide.autoResolveOnSave.description: Resolve matching open threads when the edited target span is saved.

wirespec.ide.keepResolvedTasksInTaskFile.description: Keep resolved tasks in the task export instead of removing them from the open queue.

wirespec.ide.statusBarAlignment.description: Where the WireSpec status item should appear.
